description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style handgun with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of the MAC-10. The body is constructed from a matte, metallic material with a squared-off receiver and a prominent, cylindrical barrel protruding from the front. A wireframe folding stock is attached to the rear, and the grip is vertically aligned with a ribbed texture for improved handling. The trigger guard is rectangular and robust, enclosing a simple trigger mechanism. The magazine is long and extends well below the grip, suggesting a high-capacity design, while the top of the receiver features a knurled charging handle and minimal external markings.
description: A compact, boxy submachine gun-style handgun with a metallic finish, wireframe stock, and ribbed grip. Features a long magazine and minimal external markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, wireframe stock, ribbed grip, and long magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical barrel opening, squared receiver, and the narrow profile of the grip and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the wireframe stock and charging handle visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, the wireframe stock attachment, and the top of the magazine.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is vertically oriented with a rectangular cross-section and features a ribbed, textured surface for enhanced grip. It appears to be made of a dark polymer or plastic material, providing a visual and tactile contrast to the metallic body. The grip lacks finger grooves or visible logos, focusing on a utilitarian, functional design without embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rectangular and robust, with straight edges and a squared-off profile. It is thick and solid, providing ample protection for the trigger. There are no visible undercuts, texturing, or integrated accessories, emphasizing a simple and practical design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front of the receiver. It has a plain, unadorned profile with a darkened muzzle, and there are no visible threads, ports, or compensators. The finish matches the matte metallic look of the rest of the handgun.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The exterior is plain and unmarked, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or decorative patterns apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, extending directly downward from the grip. It lacks any flaring, finger rests, or embellishments, and appears to be made of the same dark material as the grip, with a utilitarian, functional design.
